card.name: Herald of Apathy
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{W}{W} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) First strike, trample Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may exile it, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Revelation of Thorns
card.text: You may search your library for a green creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of a creature you control.

card.name: Spiralling Hatred
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker if it has mana value 2 or less. If your history in black is six or greater, instead destroy that permanent if it has mana value 4 or less. (Your history in black is the number of {B} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Distant Wanderer
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you gain 1 life and surveil 1. This creature has flying as long as your history in white is six or greater. (Your history in white is the number of {W} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Soul Ignition
card.text: Enchant creature you control At the start of combat on your turn, create a token that's a copy of enchanted creature, except it's not legendary and it has lifelink and haste. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Night Warden
card.text: Impending 4—{3} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with four time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Vigilance, trample, haste, ward {3}

card.name: Ruinbound Lich
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature unless your history in black is six or greater. (Your history in black is the number of {B} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.) At the beginning of your first main phase, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Novice Diabology
card.text: Draw two cards. You lose 3 life unless your history in black is six or greater. (Your history in black is the number of {B} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Cruel Severance
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker, discards a card, and loses 3 life. You draw a card and gain 3 life.

card.name: Crescendo
card.text: When Crescendo enters, draw two cards. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, surveil 1 and put a cadence counter on Crescendo. Remove seven counters from Crescendo: You may cast the next spell you cast from your hand this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Matriarch of Mirrors
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it. That creature loses all abilities for as long as it remains tapped.

card.name: Bioinstrumentality
card.text: Once on each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your hand with mana value lesser than or equal to the total number of artifacts and enchantments you control without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Enhanced Excisor
card.text: Deathtouch, haste When this creature dies, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, return this creature to the battlefield tapped under your control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Mechanized Augmentee
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you may sacrifice an enchantment. If you do, this creature fights up to one other target creature.

card.name: Posthuman Transmuter
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, return up to one target non-Human permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Thundering Symphony
card.text: Each creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. When a creature next dies this turn, each creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Sire of Four Hundred Thorns
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if your history in red is six or greater, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 red Vampire creature token with "{T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card." (Your history in red is the number of {R} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Cosmic Pact
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may discard a card. Draw two cards. If you didn't pay this spell's additional cost, discard two cards at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: The Grand Conductor
card.text: Each player may cast their second spell each turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: All-Consuming Calamity
card.text: Choose one or more. Pay {1}{B} for each mode chosen beyond the first. • Each player sacrifices a creature. • Each player sacrifices a planeswalker. • Each player discards two cards. • Each player exiles their graveyard. • Each player loses 3 life.

card.name: Angular Observer
card.text: Whenever Angular Observer or another creature you control enters, create a Synapse token attached to that creature. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: Wondrous Cataclysm
card.text: For each nonland permanent type, destroy up to one target permanent of that type. If this spell had three or more targets, each opponent draws a card.

card.name: Unravelled Identity
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand. Note its name. Triggered abilities of permanents with the noted name don't trigger.

card.name: Blood-Tracker
card.text: This creature has trample and ward {2} as long as it's enchanted or equipped.

card.name: Stitcher's Workshop
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 2/2 colorless Golem artifact creature token. Draw a card, then discard a card. {4}{U}, {T}: Create a 2/2 colorless Golem artifact creature token. Draw a card, then discard a card. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Ephemeral Return
card.text: Choose one— • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Reshape twice. (To reshape, you may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.)

card.name: Bringer of Madness
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature or Horror spell, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Control Center
card.text: When Control Center enters, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Savage Surge
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn. For each creature you control, create a Synapse token attached to that creature. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: Outskirts Warden
card.text: Trample When Outskirts Warden enters, it deals 4 damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker. Excess damage dealt this way is dealt to that permanent's controller.

card.name: Unknown Wilderness
card.text: Shuffle any number of target nonland permanents you own into your library, then reveal that many cards from the top of your library. Put all non-Aura permanent cards revealed this way onto the battlefield, then do the same for Aura cards, then exile the rest.

card.name: Pandemonium Wave
card.text: Pandemonium Wave deals 1 damage to each opponent and to each creature. You get a flare counter. (If a source you control would deal noncombat damage, you may pay X flare counters to have it deal that much damage plus X instead.)

card.name: Hazar, Censor of History
card.text: Protection from legendary (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything legendary.) Lifelink If one or more loyalty counters would be placed on a planeswalker you don't control, one loyalty counter is placed instead.

card.name: Clockturning
card.text: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Take an extra turn after this one. Exile Clockturning.

card.name: Neural Barbs
card.text: Create a Synapse token attached to target creature you control. It gains trample until end of turn. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.) Draw a card.

card.name: Inventive Epiphany
card.text: Target player may search their library for an artifact card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, put it into their hand, then shuffle. Return up to one target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Unreal Herald
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, put into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Ethereal Colossus
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create three synapse tokens attached it. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 for each Synapse. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: False Angel
card.text: Flying You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature card in your graveyard with mana value X or less, except it's a Shapeshifter in addition to its other types and it has flying.

card.name: Harvester of Sorrows
card.text: As the beginning of combat on your turn, create a Synapse token attached to target creature you control. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: New Dawn
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If it's a Horror, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Hyperreal Nexus
card.text: Impending 3—{2} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with two time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Flying Whenever this permanent enters or attacks, exile each opponent's graveyard.

card.name: Unborn Arbiter
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one. • Exile up to one target permanent with mana value 1. • Target opponent reveals their hand. Exile up to one card from it with mana value 1.

card.name: Efflorescing Mystic
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, exile target instant or sorcery card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of that spell without paying its mana cost. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Divine Paragon
card.text: Impending 3—{1}{W} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Flying When this permanent enters, noncreature spells cost {2} more to cast until your next turn.

card.name: Starturning Celestial
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{U} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) When this permanent enters, draw two cards.

card.name: Death to the Deathless
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Crowned Aeon
card.text: Impending 4—{2}{R} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with four time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) When this permanent enters, if it was cast, create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste. Exile it at the beginning of your next end step.

card.name: Mind Screech
card.text: Choose one or more. Pay {1}{B} for each mode chosen beyond the first. • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. • Each creature your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Efflorescent Vessel
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Flamechosen Thrall
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, you get a flare counter. (If a source you control would deal noncombat damage, you may pay X flare counters to have it deal that much damage plus X instead.) {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Freelance Slayer
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's your turn. When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to up to one target Horror.

card.name: Revelation of Mirrors
card.text: Draw X cards. You may cast a spell with mana value 3 or less from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Revelation of Light
card.text: Target player reshapes X times. (To reshape, you may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.) Exile up to one target creature or artifact.

card.name: Psychic Insight
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) When you cast this spell, if it was kicked, copy it. Surveil 1. Draw a card.

card.name: Tombwatcher
card.text: Impending 3—{5} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) When this permanent enters, destroy up to one target creature. Its controller draws a card.

card.name: Bloom from Sorrow
card.text: Create a 1/1 blue Human Scout creature token with vigilance. For each player, return up to one target nonland permanent that player controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Kalazek, Dracoform
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this creature enters or dies, reshape twice. (To reshape, you may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.)

card.name: Effloresced Archseer
card.text: Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Once each turn, whenever you put one or more counters on this creature, tap up to one target creature. Put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Slothful Mauler
Unbreaking Pulverizer
card.text: Whenever another creature or artifact you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. When Unbreaking Pulverizer dies, if it's a creature, return it to the battlefield, except it's an artifact. (It's not a creature)

card.name: Isolate and Homogenize
card.text: Target player sacrifices a nontoken creature or planeswalker. Create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.")

card.name: Calamity That Eats the Sky
card.text: Menace, reach When this creature enters, you may have all other creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Bloodlord Saladar
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 red Vampire creature token with "{T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card." Whenever you discard a card during your turn, Bloodlord Saladar deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Malevolent Heart
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Vampire creature tokens with "{T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card."

card.name: Extermination Campaign
card.text: Create two Rot tokens. (They're black enchantments with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.") Each player sacrifices two creatures.

card.name: Swallowed Sky
card.text: When Swallowed Sky enters, if it was cast, destroy all creatures and planeswalkers. Whenever an opponent draws a card, they lose 2 life.

card.name: Howling Chorus
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if your history in red is six or greater, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Copy it. You may cast that copy. (Your history in red is the number of {R} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Accretion Disk
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if it was cast, it deals 5 damage to up to one target creature. Whenever you draw a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: The Long Way Round
card.text: Choose one— • Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. • Tap target creature. Create a blue Aura enchantment token named Ten Thousand Years attached to it. The token has enchant creature and "Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step."

card.name: Keth, Cutting Specialist
card.text: Flying When Keth, Cutting Specialist enters, search your library for an artifact card with mana value 3 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You may then put an Equipment card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Devour the Future
card.text: When Devour the Future enters, draw four cards. When Devour the Future becomes the target of a spell or ability, sacrifice it. Whenever you draw a card, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Grim Coronation
card.text: When Grim Coronation enters, you and target opponent each draw two cards. If an opponent would draw a card except the first card they draw on each of their turns, they may skip that draw. If they don't, create a tapped white 2/2 Horror creature token.

card.name: Forged Enforcer
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. {1}{W}, Sacrifice a token: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Fleshborn Behemoth
card.text: This creature can't attack or block unless your history in white is six or greater. (Your history in white is the number of {W} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.) At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another nontoken creature. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's a Horror.

card.name: Janus Enforcer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, choose one— • Target player gains 2 life and draws a card. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Sentinel of Bygone Days
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If that creature was a Horror, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature instead.

card.name: Spliced Breachwarden
card.text: Flying, vigilance Spells your opponents cast cost {2} more to cast on your turn.

card.name: Transmuted Prophet
card.text: When Transmuted Prophet dies, reshape. (To reshape, you may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.)

card.name: Arc-Crowned Vessel
card.text: Other artifact creatures you control without infuse have infuse 1. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if that creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: Dreamcrawler
card.text: Affinity for creatures with flying (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature with flying you control.) Flying When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Reach through Reflections
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. Counter that spell instead if your history in blue is six or greater. (Your history in blue is the number of {U} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Wrap in Ethereal Threads
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Horror you control. Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.

card.name: Aimless Efflorescent
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent discards a card if you control three or more Horrors.

card.name: Fury of a Fallen Star
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}{R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Subterranean Coiler
card.text: Trample This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, mill X cards. Then you may return up to half X land cards, rounded down, from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Hungerborn
card.text: Vigilance When Hungerborn enters, return target card with mana value 5 or greater from your graveyard to your hand. (Your history in green is the number of {G} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Forlorn Titanshard
card.text: Protection from multicolored. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything multicolored.) When Forlorn Titanshard enters, search your library for a colorless card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Shard Bearer
card.text: When Shard Bearer enters, create a Synapse token attached to target creature you control. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.) Enchanted creatures you control have vigilance.

card.name: Labyrinth Dweller
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Stasis Chamber
card.text: When Stasis Chamber enters, exile target creature until Stasis Chamber leaves the battlefield. {2}, Sacrifice Stasis Chamber: Draw a card. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Deep Outskirts Relay
card.text: When this land enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Rageborn Efflorescent
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. If it's a Horror, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Captive Efflorescent
card.text: Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than three +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vent-Trawl Scavenger
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1. {2}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: The Unknown Sun
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle The Unknown Sun, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Bearer of Death's Gaze
card.text: This creature can't block. When this creature dies, create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.")

card.name: Aspect of Antipoise
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice a creature: This creature gains first strike until end of turn. {1}, Sacrifice a creature: Exile this creature. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at end of turn.

card.name: Bloodied Wingbeats
card.text: Put a flying counter on target creature you control. It gets +X/+X until end of turn and deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Blood Sun's Dawning
card.text: When Blood Sun's Dawning enters, discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards. Whenever you discard a nonland card, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Fleeting Efflorescent
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, reshape. (You may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.)

card.name: Mothblessed
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent exiles a card from their hand. For as long as it remains exiled, they may pay {3} at any time they could cast a sorcery to put it into their hand.

card.name: Hazeth, Last Priest
card.text: When Hazeth, Last Priest enters, create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.") {T}, Exile Hazeth: Choose target creature card in your graveyard. You may cast that card this turn.

card.name: Corrupt Consumption
card.text: Destroy up to one target creature. Target player draws a card and loses 2 life.

card.name: Oblivious Highborn
card.text: This creature enters tapped. You may cast this card from your graveyard by sacrificing an enchantment in addition to its other costs.

card.name: Harbinger's Approach
card.text: Players can't gain life. {BR}{BR}: This enchantment deals 1 damage to each player.

card.name: Crawling Efflorescent
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 red Vampire creature tokens with "{T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card." Whenever you sacrifice a creature, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Isolated Remnant
card.text: Flying Infuse 3 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than three +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.)

card.name: Grace of the Ancients
card.text: When you cast this spell, if your history in white is six or greater, copy it. You may choose new targets for it. (Your history in white is the number of {W} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.) Return up one target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Distant Warning
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target creature gains "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card" until end of turn.

card.name: Ruinous Roar
card.text: Choose one or both. Pay {1}{R} for each mode chosen beyond the first. • Destroy target artifact. • Exile the top two cards of your library. During your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Thornrider's Aid
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Excess damage dealt this way is dealt to that creature's controller. Enchanted creature has trample.

card.name: Spiteful Efflorescent
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, you draw a card and each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Deepbreather's Vision
card.text: Choose a permanent type. Reveal the top four cards of your library. Put up to two cards of the chosen type revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Tidecall Leviathan
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature you control with power 4 or greater. If you did, you draw a card and gain life equal to its power. If you didn't, remove this creature from combat.

card.name: Cruel Puppeteer
card.text: When this creature enters or attacks, you may mill two cards. Menace {3}{B}{B}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It can't block this turn. Activate only once.

card.name: Memories of Butterflies
card.text: Flying When Memories of Butterflies enters, create two 1/1 white Faerie creature tokens with flying and "This creature can't block." Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Tamed Monstrosity
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a creature. Once on each of your turns, whenever another creature you control dies, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Disgraced Researcher
card.text: Defender, trample This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender as long as you control another creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Riftway Visitor
card.text: Whenever you attack, exile up to one other target attacking creature you control. Return it to the battlefield tapped and attacking with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Doom of the Second City
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create an X/X blue Horror creature token with flying, where X is that spell's mana value.

card.name: No Plan Survives
card.text: You can only cast No Plan Survives if you have one or fewer other cards in hand. If you would draw a card, instead exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn. Cycling {UR} ({UR}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Ruin of the First City
card.text: Flying, vigilance, trample, indestructible When this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Prophellan Emissary
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices half of the creatures they control, rounded up.

card.name: Death of the Third City
card.text: Flying, trample When Death of the Third City enters, if it was cast, put target nonlegendary creature card in a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. That creature gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Architect of Calamity
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one other target creature you control loses all abilities and creature types and becomes a 5/5 Horror with trample until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Unstable Mutate
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) When this creature enters, choose a creature type. Create a Synapse token attached to each other creature you control of that type. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: Accomplished Researcher
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life and mill two cards.

card.name: Connection in Sorrow
card.text: Return up to two target permanent cards that don't share a type from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Glass Wings
Masked Guest
card.text: When this creature attacks, surveil 1. At the beginning of your end step, if your history in green is six or greater, return target land card from your graveyard to your hand. (Your history in green is the number of {G} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Hide From Fate
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Sever the Connection
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. You may exile them. (You can't change their order.) Draw a card.

card.name: Cavern Sentinel
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one or more. Pay {2} for each mode chosen beyond the first. • Return target creature or planeswalker you don't control to its owner's hand. • Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Efflorescence Specialist
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. When you do, choose one— • This creature deals 2 damage to any target. • Draw a card.

card.name: Cardiomancer
card.text: Menace This creature gets +1/+0 for each unspent {R} you have. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Undying Renegade
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the total amount of noncombat damage dealt to your opponents this turn. Flying, haste When this creature dies, exile it. During your next turn, you may play this card.

card.name: CENSORED
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. Menace When this creature enters, each player discards a card.

card.name: Electrified Exosuit
Standard-Issue Rifle
Sword of Stars
Efflorescent Pistols
card.text: When this Equipment enters, if it's not a token, create a token that's a copy of it. Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Equipped creature has first strike as long as it's your turn and two or more Equipment are attached to it. Equip {1}

card.name: Altered Farmhand
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Plainscycling {W} ({W}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Symbiotic Harvester
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 red Vampire creature token with "{T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card." Whenever you sacrifice a Vampire during your turn, Vampires you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Superheated Gladius
Timetither's Staff
card.text: {2}: Counter target spell or ability that targets equipped creature unless its controller pays {2}. {2}: Until end of turn, equipped creature must be blocked by an additional creature to be blocked. {2}: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each artifact you control. Activate only once each turn. Equip {2}

card.name: Strike with Sorrow
card.text: Choose one— • Destroy target tapped creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Bearer of Broken Wings
card.text: Affinity for creatures with flying (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature with flying you control.) This creature has flying as long as you control another creature with flying.

card.name: Veteran Slayer
card.text: Menace, reach This creature can't be blocked by Horrors.

card.name: Exl's Order
card.text: Choose one or more. As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {1} and sacrifice a creature for each mode chosen beyond the first. • You draw a card and gain 3 life. • Create two 1/1 white Faerie creature tokens with flying and "This creature can't block." • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Unstable Saviour
card.text: Flying, lifelink When this creature enters or dies, it deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Prized Test Subject
card.text: When this creature dies, create a Treasure token. If it had power 4 or greater, create an additional Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Order from Above
card.text: Choose two— • The next spell target player casts this turn costs {X} less to cast and can be cast as though it had flash. • Exile target creature or planeswalker with mana value X or less. • Target player looks at the top X cards of their library, puts one into their hand and the rest into their graveyard.

card.name: Entangled Speaker
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, exile target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls.

card.name: Skyborn Manastone
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. When it does, it deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: In the Jaws of Despair
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if it was cast, target opponent discards two cards. {4}{B}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: It deals 4 damage to target opponent and you gain 4 life.

card.name: Unaware Courier
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, mill five cards. Return a creature card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: Blood Shaper
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard one or more cards during your turn, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Distant Figure
card.text: Whenever another Human you control enters, you may either put a +1/+1 counter on this creature or on that creature.

card.name: Western Witch
card.text: When this creature enters, instant and sorcery spells cost {1} more to cast until your next turn.

card.name: Northern Witch
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, surveil 1.

card.name: Extraspacial Manipulator
card.text: {R}, {T}: Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn. {R}, {T}, Discard a card: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Herald of Tranquility
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{G}{G} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Creatures you control have trample. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Coven of Stars
card.text: When this creature enters, mill four cards. As long as your history in green is six or greater, this creature gets +3/+1 and has trample. (Your history in green is the number of {G} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Lesser Reaper
card.text: Deathtouch You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as another creature has died this turn.

card.name: Cloaked Enforcer
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Wild Manabloom
card.text: Defender When this creature enters, surveil 1. Exile a card from your graveyard: Add {G}. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Outskirts Scourge
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.") Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+0 for each enchantment you control.

card.name: Path of Conquest
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0. {2}{R}: Target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Amorphous Experiment
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If it's a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Otherwise, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Wanderer in a Lost World
card.text: This creature has first strike as long it's your turn. This creature gets +2/+1 as long as you control a Horror.

card.name: Reality Twister
card.text: Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell on each of your turns, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Prayer for the Dead
card.text: Reshape. (You may create a 2/2 white Horror creature token or exile a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to create a token that's a copy of it.)

card.name: High-Impact Munitions
Spaceripper Gauntlet
Plastic Dream
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Its controller creates a colorless Equipment artifact token named Sword with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.

card.name: Fortified District
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {R}. {R}{R}, {T}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn. This ability costs {R} less to activate if this land entered this turn.

card.name: Nexus of Creation
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: You may play land cards from your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Mining Outpost
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it into the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.

card.name: Swamp
card.text: {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Island
card.text: {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Forest
card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Plains
card.text: {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Mountain
card.text: {T}: Add {R}

card.name: Breach of Nature
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell. The next spell its controller casts this turn costs {1} more to cast.

card.name: Bioengineering Bay
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {U}. {2}{U}{U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. This ability costs {2}{U} less to activate if this land entered this turn.

card.name: Brilliant Tower
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W}. {3}{W}{W}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token. This ability costs {3}{W} less to activate if this land entered this turn.

card.name: Outskirts Research Station
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {G}. {2}{G}{G}, {T}: Target creature gains trample until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery. This ability costs {2}{G} less to activate if this land entered this turn.

card.name: Underground Apparatus
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add {B}. {1}{B}{B}, {T}: Target player mills two cards. This ability costs {1}{B} less to activate if this land entered this turn.

card.name: Herald of Enlightenment
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{U}{U} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Flying, trample Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card.

card.name: Horror HFB
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink, haste

card.name: Incursive Structure
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {4}: Put this card from your hand onto the battlefield. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Horror HFB
card.text: Flying

card.name: Faerie HFB
card.text: Flying This creature can't block.

card.name: Human Scout HFB
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Vampire HFB
card.text: {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Rot HFB
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.

card.name: Moonspot HFB
card.text: {T}: Add {R} At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this land.

card.name: Human HFB
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, untap target creature or land.

card.name: Synapse HFB
card.text: (Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse, no matter how many synapses are attached to it.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0.

card.name: Treasure HFB
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Flare HFB
card.text: If a source you control would deal noncombat damage, you may pay X flare counters to have it deal that much damage plus X instead.

card.name: Hero of the Night
card.text: This creature has lifelink as long as it's attacking. This creature gets +1/+0 and has vigilance as long as it's equipped.

card.name: Moondrenched Outsider
card.text: When this creature enters, create a colorless land token named Moonspot with "{T}: Add {R}" and "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this land." Lands you control lose all abilities except for mana abilities.

card.name: Queen of Flytraps
card.text: Flash Vigilance, reach When Queen of Flytraps enters and at the beginning of your end step, untap each creature you control.

card.name: Harmonious Aeon
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{G} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) When this permanent enters, mill four cards. Return a land card from your graveyard to your hand. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Setting Sun
card.text: Destroy all creatures.

card.name: The Long Walk
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, if it entered from a graveyard, was cast from a graveyard or was created with a reshape ability, you gain life equal to its power and draw a card. This ability only triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Teller of Nine Thousand Tales
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. {X}{W}{W}, Pay X life, Exile this creature: Return up to X target creatures with total mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Vain Efflorescent
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Prodigal Neuromancer
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than two +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Once each turn, whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, you may create a tapped 2/2 colorless Golem artifact creature token.

card.name: The Crawling Room
card.text: When The Crawling Room enters, mill four cards. {G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature you control with mana value X: Return target creature card with mana value X plus 1 from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Cosmic Visitor
card.text: Infuse 5 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than five +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Whenever you put one or more counters on this creature, target player mills cards equal to its power.

card.name: Herald of Arbitration
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{B}{B} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Menace, trample Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, that player loses 3 life unless they discard a card.

card.name: Herald of Meteors
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{R}{R} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) Trample, haste Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Cursed Ammunition
card.text: Cursed Ammunition deals 2 damage to any target and 1 damage to up to one other target.

card.name: Harmony of Might
card.text: When Harmony of Might enters, draw a card for each creature you control with power 4 or greater. Whenever you cast a creature spell with power 4 or greater, untap each land you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Devil's Bullet
card.text: Devil's Bullet deals 2 damage to any target. You get a flare counter. (If a source you control would deal noncombat damage, you may pay X flare counters to have it deal that much damage plus X instead.)

card.name: Aeon of a Perfect World
card.text: Flying Artifacts and creatures your opponents control enter tapped.

card.name: A New World
card.text: Creatures you control can't be blocked as long as you've put a +1/+1 counter on them this turn. {3}{U}{U}: Reveal the top four cards of your library. Put a noncreature card revealed this way into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Want Not
card.text: Whenever a player mills one or more land cards, create a tapped Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever a player mills one or more nonland, noncreature cards, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Souls Aflame
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you get a flare counter. (If a source you control would deal noncombat damage, you may pay X flare counters to have it deal that much damage plus X instead.) Whenever you pay one or more flare counters, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until your next end step.

card.name: Worldpulse
card.text: Enchanted creatures you control have ward {1} and trample. Whenever you sacrifice an Aura, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature that Aura was attached to.

card.name: Coralblight Survivor
card.text: Infuse 1 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Once each turn, whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on this creature, untap up to two target lands.

card.name: Mystic Torrent
card.text: Mystic Torrent deals damage equal to the amount of mana spent to cast it to target creature or planeswalker. When it deals five or more damage this way, add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Reckless Kineticist
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, this creature deals 2 damage to the defending player.

card.name: Suffer, As I Have
card.text: Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard. It enters with a finality counter on it. Whenever a creature you control enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Revelation of Pain
card.text: Up to X target creatures can't block until end of turn. Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Lurking Absolution
card.text: When you cast this spell, return a card named Lurking Absolution from your graveyard to the battlefield. Haste Whenever this creature attacks, mill three cards.

card.name: A Promise
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if it was cast, untap each basic land you control. Once each turn, whenever you cast a Horror spell, you may draw a card.

card.name: The Monster is the Maze
card.text: Trample When this creature dies, if it's a creature, return it to the battlefield as an enchantment artifact with "{3}, {T}: You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Sacrifice the creature at the beginning of the next end step."

card.name: Palace of Blood and Blade
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named Sword with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2} attached to that creature.

card.name: Missing Evidence
card.text: Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {1}{UB}, Pay 2 life, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two Clue tokens. Activate only if you control no Clues.

card.name: Ceaseless Mirage
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 red and blue Reflection creature token. {UR}, Sacrifice three Reflections: The next time you cast a noncreature spell this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Monument To A Lost World
card.text: {1}, {T}: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 2 from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ten Thousand Years HFB
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

card.name: Sword HFB
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Accelerator Drone
card.text: When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, choose a counter on target permanent or player. You may either give that permanent or player another counter of that kind or remove that counter.

card.name: Underwitch
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.") This creature gets +1/+3 as long as you control three or more enchantments.

card.name: Revelation of Steel
card.text: Create X tapped Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") For each token you control, you gain 1 life and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Spacial Rend
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent with mana value X or less, where X is one plus the number of Horrors you controlled as you cast this spell.

card.name: Undying Observer
card.text: Flying, vigilance Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than two +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on this creature, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Progenitor of Desire
card.text: Impending 3—{1}{B} (If this spell was cast for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until they're removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove one.) When this permanent enters, target opponent reveals their hand and discards a card with the lowest mana value among the revealed nonland cards.

card.name: Thirst for Legacy
card.text: Draw three cards and discard a card. Then you discard another card unless your history in blue is six or greater. (Your history in blue is the number of {U} symbols in mana costs in your graveyard.)

card.name: Samet, Crawling Filth
card.text: When Samet, Crawling Filth enters, search your library for a creature card with power 4 or greater, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Marching Deepbreathers
card.text: When this creature enters, create two Synapse tokens attached to target creature you control. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card and sacrifice one attached Synapse.)

card.name: Backstreet Extortionists
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a creature with power 4 or greater. When this creature enters, up to one other creature you control fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Seasoned Exsanguinator
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a Vampire or pay {2}. Menace When this creature enters, discard two cards, then draw two cards.

card.name: Swordsaint
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's your turn. Whenever this creature attacks, you may attach an Equipment you control to it.

card.name: Shadowform Exterminator
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, create a Rot token. (It's a black enchantment with "At the beginning of your end step, target player mills a card.")

card.name: Awakened Bladefiend
card.text: Infuse 2 (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if this creature has fewer than two +1/+1 counters on it, put one on it.) Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on this creature, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card during your next turn.

card.name: Efflorescence Cleanup Crew
card.text: This creature has indestructible as long as it's your turn. If a card would be put into an opponent's graveyard, exile it instead. {3}{WB}{WB}: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Radiant Exemplar
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. {1}{W}: This creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Settled Mariner
card.text: Other permanents you control have ward {1}. (Whenever that permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

card.name: Furioso; Fury; Scream
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Target creature you control gains trample and has base power equal to twice X until end of turn.

card.name: Starchosen Regent
card.text: Flying, first strike, lifelink, protection from Angels and from Demons (This creature can't be blocked, targeted or dealt damage by Angels or Demons.) Players can't sacrifice permanents.
